criteria.name: AI-Powered Task Management
criteria.description: The app utilizes AI to automate task creation, prioritization, and scheduling.
criteria.sources: Motion, Taskade, ClickUp, Todoist, Asana, Wrike

criteria.name: Intelligent Calendar Integration
criteria.description: Seamlessly integrates with calendar applications to optimize scheduling and time blocking using AI.

criteria.name: AI Writing Assistance
criteria.description: Provides AI-driven suggestions for writing, grammar, and content creation to enhance productivity.

criteria.name: Meeting Transcription and Summarization
criteria.description: Automatically transcribes and summarizes meetings using AI, saving time on note-taking.

criteria.name: Workflow Automation
criteria.description: Enables users to create automated workflows between different apps using AI to streamline repetitive tasks.

criteria.name: AI-Enhanced Search
criteria.description: Uses AI to provide more relevant and efficient search results within the app or across multiple platforms.

criteria.name: AI-Powered Content Creation
criteria.description: Leverages AI to generate various forms of content, including text, images, and videos.

criteria.name: AI-Driven Email Management
criteria.description: Employs AI to sort, prioritize, and summarize emails, making inbox management more efficient.

criteria.name: AI Knowledge Management
criteria.description: Utilizes AI to organize and connect information, creating a smart knowledge base for improved productivity.
